body.title: Wire consult into _process_network_msg for near-zero-confidence reasoning
body.result: Inline hook in _process_network_msg at empty-response branch. ConsultState built from user_turn+thread_excerpt. Hypotheses→TWM with consult_hypothesis category + pursuit_id metadata. Non-fatal on consult/TWM failure. 5 tests. 0939efd5.
body.description:
Wire ConsultSession into _process_network_msg. Trigger: BG WINNOW fires with confidence below threshold (handful of habits all sub-0.3) on a non-habit tier fallthrough. Build ConsultState from user turn + thread context + TWM top-K; ask the consult prompt; push hypotheses + next_question into TWM as markers with category='consult_hypothesis', metadata includes active pursuit_id so the reasoning path has scaffolding for the next turn. Consult happens BEFORE tier.2 fallthrough — it shapes what reasoning sees, not what reasoning produces.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/main.py (_process_network_msg), tests/test_reasoning_consult.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN — confidence-gated consult trigger at BG fallthrough + TWM marker integration. OUT — changing BG scoring, tier selection logic, reply suppressors. Same-thread-same-kind rate-limit applies.
**Test plan:** integration-ish test with mocked inference_gateway: BG fallthrough with low confidence triggers consult; TWM markers appear with correct category + pursuit_id metadata. Control case: habit fires above threshold, no consult triggered.
